title: SeasonsAndHolidays
description:
SeasonsAndHolidays Plugin
Applies real-time seasonal effects and holiday-themed events based on the actual calendar, including snow in winter, falling leaves in autumn, and festive mobs during Halloween, Christmas, and Easter.
body:
SeasonsAndHolidays
A Bukkit plugin that brings Minecraft to life with real-time seasonal changes and holiday-themed events. Experience snow in winter, falling leaves in autumn, and festive mobs and effects for Halloween, Christmas, and Easter—all based on the real-world calendar automatically.
